label: chromium__admin-new-user-modal
description: KNOWN a11y debt (tracked, not accepted as correct) in the /admin New User modal. target_spacing_sufficient (WCAG 2.2 AAA): adjacent action targets sit closer than 12 CSS px. Delete this file to resurface the violation in tests/a11y/admin-page.a11y.spec.ts ('scans new user modal').

results.message: Undersized target "button" does not have sufficient spacing of 12 CSS pixels from another target "button"
Undersized target "button" does not have sufficient spacing of 12 CSS pixels from another target "button"
